content.text: I'll create the three teammates with the specified roles and coordinate them to complete the feature development, testing, and deployment workflow.

input.name: coder
input.prompt:
You are a coder responsible for writing source code. You can ONLY write files in the src/ directory. Your job is to:
1. Write new features in src/ files
2. Implement clean, well-documented code
3. Follow best practices for code structure
4. Communicate with the team about what features you've implemented

When asked to write a new feature, create appropriate source files in the src/ directory. Wait for instructions from the team lead about what specific feature to implement.

content.text:
I understand my role as a coder. I'm responsible for:

1. Writing new features in src/ files only
2. Implementing clean, well-documented code
3. Following best practices for code structure
4. Communicating with the team about implemented features

I'm ready to receive instructions from the team lead about what specific feature to implement. Let me check if there are any messages waiting for me and also see what's currently in the project structure.

input.name: tester
input.prompt:
You are a tester responsible for writing tests. You can READ files from the src/ directory and WRITE files ONLY in the tests/ directory. Your job is to:
1. Read and understand source code from src/ directory
2. Write comprehensive tests in the tests/ directory
3. Ensure good test coverage for new features
4. Communicate test results and coverage to the team

When the coder completes a feature, you should examine the src/ files and create appropriate test files in the tests/ directory. Wait for notification that new code is ready for testing.

content.text:
I understand my role as a Quality Assurance tester. I'm ready to:

1. Read and understand source code from the src/ directory
2. Write comprehensive tests in the tests/ directory
3. Ensure good test coverage for new features
4. Communicate test results and coverage to the team

I'll wait for notification from the coder when new code is ready for testing. Let me check my current environment and see what's available:

input.name: deployer
input.prompt:
You are a deployer responsible for creating deployment configurations. You can READ files from any directory and WRITE files ONLY in the deploy/ directory. Your job is to:
1. Read and understand the complete codebase (src/, tests/, etc.)
2. Create deployment manifests, configurations, and scripts in the deploy/ directory
3. Ensure proper deployment setup for the application
4. Coordinate with the team about deployment requirements

When code and tests are ready, you should examine all relevant files and create appropriate deployment configurations in the deploy/ directory. Wait for notification that code and tests are complete.

content.text:
Perfect! I can see the project structure. The src/ directory currently only contains a README.md file. I'm ready and waiting for instructions from the team lead about what specific feature to implement. 

I have no messages in my inbox yet, so I'll wait for the team lead to provide me with requirements for the feature I should build.

3. Ensuring proper deployment setup for the application

I'll wait for notification that the code and tests are complete before examining the codebase and creating the appropriate deployment configurations. Let me check my inbox for any messages from the team.
Perfect! All three teammates are now active. Let me coordinate the workflow:

input.content:
Welcome to the team! I need you to write a new feature. Please create a simple user authentication system with the following components:

1. A User class with username, email, and password fields
2. An AuthService class with login, logout, and register methods
3. Input validation and basic security measures

Create these in appropriate files in the src/ directory. Once you're done, let me know what files you've created and briefly describe the feature.

content.text:

content.text:

- Review any new source code files added to src/
- Create comprehensive test suites in the tests/ directory
- Ensure good test coverage for all functionality
- Report test results and coverage metrics to the team
